effect.content: *Results may vary. Study results seen in 12- and 26-week trials… / These results were observed in the study, but the analysis cannot be used to draw conclusions.

rule_text: Efficacy claims must carry the approved qualifier "*Results may vary. Study results seen in 12- and 26-week trials…" and the limitation "These results were observed in the study, but the analysis cannot be used to draw conclusions."
intent: Attach required MLR qualifier and limitation to efficacy claims.
summary: Efficacy claims require qualifier "*Results may vary. Study results seen in 12- and 26-week trials…" and limitation "These results observed but analysis can't draw conclusions.
